title: rubus alterniflorus subsp. stereobelus
intro: Rubus alterniflorus subsp. stereobelus, also known as the alternate-leaved blackberry, is a subspecies of the blackberry plant that is native to East Asia. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its anthocyanins, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus alterniflorus subsp. stereobelus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide protection against certain types of cancer. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
